prompt: Read D:/sun-skills/prd-task-archiver/evals/files/standalone-prds/analytics-dashboard-prd.md. Split it into frontend, backend, testing, and release tasks. Save the resulting Markdown task archive under your assigned outputs directory as analytics-dashboard-tasks.md.
assertions: The archive is saved as analytics-dashboard-tasks.md in the assigned outputs directory.
Tasks cover frontend, backend, testing, and release areas.
Each task includes a deliverable and acceptance criteria.
Permissions, export behavior, chart behavior, and role visibility from the PRD are reflected in the task split.
Assumptions from the PRD are listed instead of being silently treated as confirmed facts.
